title: Ethereal Enhanced Weaponry
description: Enhances your weapons to unlock new power!
body:
## Introduction
do you ever get bored of normal weapons and don't want to add a new ore? well, fear not because Ethereal Enhanced Weaponry has got ya. This mod aims to make a new level to diamond and netherite (with a bonus weapon)! [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) is recomended as the weapons are developed with the balances of Enchancement (Without it the weapons might go outside the balance of vanilla minecraft). 
# Weapon Limitations
Now, some measures are in place to balance things out.
- if both Heretical and Divinity weapons are found inside your inventory they will not give any special abilities and will pester you in the chat to remove one.
<details>
<summary>Misc Items</summary>

| Item             | Stats               |Crafting/ Material Cost    |
|:----------------:|---------------------|--------------------|
| Holy Scrap       | Does not burn in lava|2 Quartz, 2 Glowstone, 1 Netherite Scrap|
| Demonic Scrap    | Does not burn in lava|5 Netherite scrap, 2 Amethyst Clusters, 2 Crying Obsidian|
|Crimson Obsidian  |N/A                   | 8 Obsidian, 1 red nether brick -> 7 Crimson Obsidian|
|Crying Crimson Obsidian|N/A|8 crying obsidian, 1 red nether brick -> 7 Crying Crimson Obsidian|
|Crystal of Divinity|Does not burn in lava|4 Holy Scrap, 2 Quartz, 2 calcite, 1 End Crystal|
|Crystal of Heretical|Does not burn in lava|4 Demonic Scrap, 4 Crying Crimson Obsidian, 1 End Crystal|
</details>

<details>
<summary>Weapons</summary>

### Divine Paladun
**On Hit: Divine Smite**
- When striking an enemy, if the target is a Monster entity, you deal an additional 2-4 holy damage (along with a display only thunder strike).
On a successful Smite, you gain 1 Blessing

**Passive: Holy Water**
- Having Speed on you while not slowed transfers the Speed into 1 Blessing and Slowness (15sec slowness)

**R-Click: Channel Divinity**
- When you reach 3 Blessings and right click, everyone within a large area will be glowing, with - people in a small area getting night vision
- Using this also grants Resistance 
- While under Channel Divinity, you are able to use Divine Smite on any mob that can be attacked (25% chance)
- Must be on the ground, not sprinting, and not swimming

**Divinity Ultimate: Divine Blessing**
- When you are not on the ground and have 5+ Blessings, you are able to spread your blessings, granting regen 2 for 6 seconds to anyone around you
- The range of the blessing is determined by how many blessings you have
- At 10 Blessings (Max), Regen lasts an additional second
- People (including you) who have been blessed will receive the Divine Blessing effect.
- Divine Blessing protects you from wither, poison, and Eternal Flame

### Heretical Inferno
**On Hit: Volcanic**
- As soon as you attack an entity, grants the user the Volcanic effect
- While under volcanic, you are constantly on fire
- During Volcanic, you will be granted Strength
- Attacking again after Volcanic has ended allows Strength to stack up to 3
- Fire Res will be confiscated upon activation, with you being able to regain it after the timer is up (copies duration)


**R-Click: Ashen Wrath**
- The user sacrifices 4 hearts instantly upon right click (true damage)
- In return, they gain Ashen Wrath for 15 seconds:
- All your melee attacks burn Shields. (Does not affect Netherite Shields)
- Each hit deals +2 fire damage (partial true damage).
- However, if you don’t attack within 3 seconds, you take 2 fire damage instead.
- Double Ashen Wrath doubles the amount of fire damage that you inflicted and get inflicted via Ashen Wrath

**Heretical Ultimate: Eternal Flame**
- Once you reach Strength three, you are able to Give the Eternal Flame to every Entity within a 15 block radius, including you
- Eternal Flame keeps you on fire until it is up
- While on fire, anything you use as an attack will set the target on fire (Wardenspine flame go brrr)
- Jumping in water boils the water
- If you are in rain, the block above you will turn into basalt
- Duration is 15 seconds
</details>

## Q&A
Q: When will you update/backport the mod to 1.x.x

_A: I am not going to backport this mod, and updating the mod to other versions is something that I am not going to take requests on, the versions that I update them to are the versions that will be avalible, once I update this mod to a new version, all updates will no longer happen for that version unless it was a planned to be. (E.E.W. was planned to be reverted back to 1.19.2)_

Q: Can I include this in my modpack

_A: Yes, just make sure to credit me on the modrinth page_

Q: How can I contact you if I need something removed from the mod?  

_A: If you are the rightful owner of content used in this mod and believe it should be removed, please contact me on discord or at neptunite.horizons@gmail.com with proof of ownership and a clear reason for the request. (Example: You are the owner of [Charter](https://modrinth.com/mod/charter) and the Gilded Contract is way too simular to the Contract that you made. Write me an email or contact me via discord.)_

Q: I don’t like how the mod plays. Can I ask for a rework?

_A: The mod is designed with a specific vision in mind. If it doesn't fit your playstyle, you are welcome to modify it for personal use or suggest changes in my discord, but I am not obligated to implement every request. Additionally, if you are wanting a specific item removed from my mod, you can do so via [Item Obliterator](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-obliterator), and if you want chaos([Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement)) to not apply an effect after the item is removed, there is a tag inside of enchancement that has a list of effects that cannot be granted by chaos(Exampe: Hero of the Village), just use a datapack that replaces that tag list._

Q: Where is the 2.x.x documentation and the 1.x.x documentation?

_A: Check the Changelogs, the old ones are over there.
